---
title: &TITLE Montaque Reynolds
last: Reynolds
first: Montaque
people_group: "pi"
email: "mreynolds1@stetson.edu"
education:
  - Ph.D Philosophy | Saint Louis University | 2024 <br> M.A.
subtitle: "Visiting Assistant Professor, Philosophy"
description: ""
project: "dmref"
affiliation: Stetson University
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs
  contents:
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:montaque.reynolds@gmail.com
    - text: CV
      icon: mortarboard
      href: https://2026-teacing-portfolio.netlify.app/resume-cv
    - icon: assignment
      text: Teaching Portfolio
      href: https://2026-teacing-portfolio.netlify.app/data/course.phil.sc/syllabus
---

Montaque Reynolds is an visiting assistant professor of philosophy at Stetson University. As a philosopher and educator, he is deeply passionate about leveraging artificial intelligence and interactive storytelling to enhance human reasoning, ethical decision-making, and overall flourishing—particularly for underserved youth. In 2024, he obtained a PhD in Philosophy from Saint Louis University. Now, with a small team, he develops interactive philosophical thought simulations using massively multiplayer online game platforms fostering critical thinking, moral imagination, and empathy.
